# Registry Contribution

Please choose the appropriate pull request template for your contribution.

## Adding or Updating a Project Type

Use the [Project Type template](?expand=1&template=project-type.md)

## Adding or Updating a Toolchain

Use the [Toolchain template](?expand=1&template=toolchain.md)

## Important

- A pull request may modify exactly one project type or one toolchain
- A pull request may not modify both project types and toolchains
- Existing entries must increment their version number
- `manifest.toml` is generated automatically and should not be edited

If you are viewing this template, please close this pull request and create a new one using one of the links above.
